jobs.title: Director, Clinical Guidance Methodology
jobs.company_name: American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists
jobs.content: <p><strong>About ACOG</strong></p><p>The American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists is seeking a Director, Clinical Guidance Methodology to lead methodology & evidence-synthesis workstreams.</p>

jobs.title: Human Resources Business Partner
jobs.company_name: American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists
jobs.content: <p>Serve as the strategic HR partner for ACOG&rsquo;s clinical practice & education divisions at the Washington, DC HQ.</p>

jobs.title: Instructional Designer
jobs.company_name: American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists
jobs.content: <p>Design CME / MOC II / MOC IV continuing-education curricula for ACOG&rsquo;s ob-gyn member audience.</p>
